# Contributing

Thank you for your interest in contributing to this project! Before opening issues or submitting pull requests, please review the guidelines below.

## How to Contribute

1. Search existing issues and pull requests before creating a new one.
2. Open an issue if you find a bug or want to request a feature.
3. For code contributions, fork the repository and create a new branch.
4. Submit a pull request with a clear description of your changes.

## Code Style

- Keep code consistent with the existing style in the repository.
- Write clear, concise commit messages.
- Add comments where needed to explain non-obvious logic.

## Pull Request Checklist

- [ ] I have read the project code of conduct.
- [ ] My changes are small and focused.
- [ ] I have tested my changes locally.
- [ ] I have added or updated documentation if necessary.

## Reporting Security Issues

If you discover a security vulnerability, do not open a public issue. Instead, follow the instructions in `SECURITY.md`.
